questions.question: Explain the difference between public cloud, private cloud and hybrid cloud computing models. Provide examples of each.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics of each model and provide at least one real-world example for each.

questions.question: Describe the role of data encryption in cloud security. How can it help protect cloud data from unauthorized access?
questions.hint: Focus on the key benefits of data encryption in cloud computing

questions.question: State the importance of data sovereignty in cloud computing and explain how it affects cloud users. Provide an example of a country with strict data sovereignty laws.
questions.hint: Describe the implications of data sovereignty laws on cloud users and provide an example of a country with such laws
